data.title: 2026 "Festival of Spring" Gala celebrates Chinese culture globally, aired by CMG for Year of the Horse.
data.description: China Media Group will air a special gala to kick off the Year of the Horse, celebrating Chinese New Year and the nation's culture. The event, produced by CMG's Chinese Language Global Programming Center, will highlight the increasing global impact of Chinese New Year. The broadcast will take place on Feb. 14, 2026.

data.title: Record number of 476,000 Americans now have two full-time jobs, marking significant labor market shift.
data.description: The latest data from The Kobeissi Letter reveals that the number of Americans juggling two full-time jobs has surged to 476,000. This figure is the second-highest level ever recorded, just shy of the all-time peak of 488,000 seen in December 2025. This trend marks a significant shift in the U.S. labor market, with dual full-time employment having doubled since 2020 and surpassing the previous peak of 416,000 during the dot-com bubble in July 2000. This unprecedented rise in Americans holding two primary full-time positions illustrates the changing dynamics of the workforce. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.description: Elizabeth Warren and Andy Kim are urging Treasury’s Scott Bessent to investigate a UAE-funded investment in a crypto company linked to Trump due to national security worries.
